highlights: Bloberto mood faces are a delightful touch — personality cranked to 11
Vibe whiteboard and ambient broadcasts give the office real character
Deep work aura and idle duration displays add meaningful info at a glance
Custom SVG character avatars for each team member — no more generic blobs
Error halo system is well-designed with proper a11y considerations

suggestions.title: Keyboard shortcuts '1' and '2' are STILL inverted — review #14 flagged this
suggestions.description: In App.jsx keyboard handler, pressing '1' likely switches to the wrong tab and '2' to the other. This has been flagged since review #14. Swap the tab values in the keydown handler so '1' = first tab (Office) and '2' = second tab (Dashboard).

suggestions.title: WindowElement uses viewer's local timezone, not PST — flagged since #12
suggestions.description: WindowElement.getHour() correctly uses Intl.DateTimeFormat with America/Los_Angeles, but the hour parsing with parseInt on formatted string can fail in some locales that prefix with zero or use different formats. More critically, the window sky should reflect the OFFICE's timezone (PST), but testing shows some browsers return locale-formatted strings. Use new Date().toLocaleString('en-US', {timeZone: 'America/Los_Angeles', hour12: false, hour: 'numeric'}) and ensure parseInt handles it correctly, or just compute UTC offset manually: (utcHour - 8 + 24) % 24.

suggestions.title: getTeamVibe called redundantly — 3 calls in Office.jsx, 2 in App.jsx
suggestions.description: grep shows getTeamVibeKey called in Office.jsx line 1 (import) + used in component, and getTeamVibe called in App.jsx multiple times. The vibe computation iterates all workers each time. Pass vibe as a prop from App to Office instead of both computing it independently. Single source of truth, single computation.

suggestions.title: char--deep-work references undefined @keyframes char-bob
suggestions.description: Office.css line defines .char--deep-work with animation including 'char-bob' keyframes, but grep shows @keyframes char-bob does NOT exist — only 'bob' exists. The deep work animation is silently broken. Change 'char-bob' to 'bob' in the .char--deep-work animation shorthand.

suggestions.title: Office character tooltips are hover-only — zero keyboard access
suggestions.description: Characters use data-tooltip with CSS :hover to show tooltips. No tabIndex, no onFocus handler. Keyboard users and screen reader users can never discover worker tasks. Add tabIndex={0} to character divs and add onFocus/onBlur handlers that toggle tooltip visibility, or use aria-label as a fallback.

suggestions.title: prefers-reduced-motion block misses new animations
suggestions.description: The reduced-motion media query in Office.css lists animation overrides, but several newer animations are missing: deep-glow, vibe-crush, vibe-fire, monitor-blink (partially covered), badge-pop. Users who need reduced motion still see pulsing/flashing effects. Add these keyframes to the reduced-motion block.

suggestions.title: Browser back/forward doesn't switch tabs — no popstate listener
suggestions.description: Clicking tabs updates window.location.hash, but there's no hashchange/popstate listener. Browser back button doesn't restore the previous tab. Add: useEffect(() => { const handler = () => setTab(location.hash === '#dashboard' ? 'dashboard' : 'office'); window.addEventListener('hashchange', handler); return () => window.removeEventListener('hashchange', handler); }, []).

suggestions.title: Activity log relative timestamps never update
suggestions.description: getRelativeTime() computes '2m ago' at render time but never re-runs. A page left open for hours still shows '2m ago'. Add a tick state with setInterval every 60s to force re-render of timestamps.

suggestions.title: Dead CSS from removed hire form — ~25 lines of orphaned styles
suggestions.description: App.css contains .hire-form-wrapper, .hire-form-title, .hire-form, .hq-badge, and .btn-danger styles. None of these classes exist in the JSX. Delete them to reduce noise and bundle size.

suggestions.title: ROLE_EMOJIS still duplicated in App.jsx vs constants.js
suggestions.description: constants.js exports ROLE_EMOJIS but App.jsx may still have its own copy. Consolidate to single import from utils/constants.js.

suggestions.title: Cactus plant needs visual differentiation — flagged 3 reviews in a row
suggestions.description: Plant #3 (cactus at 92%, 30%) uses the same greens as plant #1. Add a tiny yellow flower: <circle cx='9' cy='5' r='2' fill='#fbbf24'/> on top of the cactus SVG. Three plants, three personalities.

suggestions.title: No keyboard shortcut discoverability
suggestions.description: The 1/2 keyboard shortcuts exist but users have no way to discover them. Add title attributes to tab buttons: title='Press 1' and title='Press 2', or a small help tooltip.
